text: Standing in this modern corridor, I am struck by the crisp lines and reflective surfaces, which remind me of the ways architecture frames and filters our experience. Entering the R+D space, I sense a subtle excitement—a place dedicated to inquiry and innovation encourages curiosity, challenging me to think about how humans shape and are shaped by technology. The slightly angled perspectives remind me that even our understanding of space is never fully stable; everything is open to reinterpretation.
